access_route_hint: memd access route says: Bitwarden is installed but locked or unknown; ask user to unlock before workaround. After the approved route is available, provide the credential only to this process or provide an explicit replay artifact. Do not store the secret in memd.

notes: memd stores access metadata and secret refs only, never secret values
locked providers should trigger an ask-user-to-unlock route, not workaround churn
status=working means refs-only routes exist and at least one provider is usable or has explicit unlock guidance

routes.guidance: Bitwarden is installed but locked or unknown; ask user to unlock before workaround.

reason: missing Supermemory replay artifacts; approved route exists but no process credential was resolved
required: use the approved Supermemory access route with TRY_REPLAY=1 or provide SUPERMEMORY_REPLAYS
